title: The Ace of Hearts

evidence.note: Published 1921; the 95-year US copyright term has expired for works published through 1930, so the film print is public domain in the US by term expiry.

diy_links.label: Stanford Copyright Renewal DB — search “The Ace of Hearts” (renewals ~1948, 1949, 1950)
Catalog of Copyright Entries (archive.org) — browse the Motion Pictures renewal-year volume by hand
US Copyright Office public records (1978+ renewals/assignments)

editorial: The Ace of Hearts is a 1921 American crime drama produced and directed by Wallace Worsley for Goldwyn Pictures, starring Lon Chaney and Leatrice Joy in a story of a secret vigilante society that plots an assassination. It reunited Chaney and Worsley after their earlier collaboration on The Penalty (1920). As a 1921 US publication, the film print is public domain by expiry of the 95-year US copyright term; other layers remain undetermined.
